content.content:
400→				Duration: time.Since(stepStart),
   401→			})
   402→		}
   403→	}
   404→
   405→	// Step 4: Commit changes
   406→	commitMessage := fmt.Sprintf("Applied recipe transformations for workflow %s", r.config.ID)
   407→	if err := r.gitOps.CommitChanges(ctx, repoPath, commitMessage); err != nil {
   408→		result.ErrorMessage = fmt.Sprintf("failed to commit changes: %v", err)
   409→		result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   410→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to commit changes: %w", err)
   411→	}
   412→	result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   413→		StepID:  "commit",
   414→		Success: true,
   415→		Message: "Committed changes",
   416→	})
   417→
   418→	// Step 5: Run build check
   419→	buildStart := time.Now()
   420→	appName := GenerateAppName(r.config.ID)
   421→	timeout, err := r.config.ParseBuildTimeout()
   422→	if err != nil {
   423→		result.ErrorMessage = fmt.Sprintf("invalid build timeout: %v", err)
   424→		result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   425→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid build timeout: %w", err)
   426→	}
   427→
   428→	buildConfig := common.DeployConfig{
   429→		App:           appName,
   430→		Lane:          r.config.Lane,
   431→		Environment:   "dev",
   432→		Timeout:       timeout,
   433→		ControllerURL: "", // Will be set by the actual implementation
   434→	}
   435→
   436→	buildResult, err := r.buildChecker.CheckBuild(ctx, buildConfig)
   437→	if err != nil || (buildResult != nil && !buildResult.Success) {
   438→		message := "Build check failed"
   439→		if buildResult != nil && buildResult.Message != "" {
   440→			message = buildResult.Message
   441→		}
   442→		if err != nil {
   443→			message = fmt.Sprintf("%s: %v", message, err)
   444→		}
   445→
   446→		result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   447→			StepID:   "build",
   448→			Success:  false,
   449→			Message:  message,
   450→			Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   451→		})
   452→
   453→		// Check if self-healing is enabled
   454→		if r.config.SelfHeal != nil && r.config.SelfHeal.Enabled && r.jobSubmitter != nil {
   455→			// Attempt healing workflow
   456→			healingSummary, healingErr := r.attemptHealing(ctx, repoPath, message)
   457→			result.HealingSummary = healingSummary
   458→
   459→			if healingErr == nil && healingSummary.Winner != nil {
   460→				// Healing succeeded! Continue with the healed version
   461→				result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   462→					StepID:   "healing",
   463→					Success:  true,
   464→					Message:  fmt.Sprintf("Healing succeeded with plan %s", healingSummary.PlanID),
   465→					Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   466→				})
   467→				// Continue with normal workflow (push, etc.)
   468→			} else {
   469→				// Healing also failed
   470→				result.ErrorMessage = "build check failed and healing failed"
   471→				result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   472→				return nil, fmt.Errorf("build check failed: %s (healing also failed: %v)", message, healingErr)
   473→			}
   474→		} else {
   475→			// No healing enabled, fail immediately
   476→			result.ErrorMessage = "build check failed"
   477→			result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   478→			return nil, fmt.Errorf("build check failed: %s", message)
   479→		}
   480→	}
   481→
   482→	if buildResult != nil {
   483→		result.BuildVersion = buildResult.Version
   484→	}
   485→	result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   486→		StepID:   "build",
   487→		Success:  true,
   488→		Message:  "Build completed successfully",
   489→		Duration: time.Since(buildStart),
   490→	})
   491→
   492→	// Step 6: Push branch
   493→	if err := r.gitOps.PushBranch(ctx, repoPath, r.config.TargetRepo, branchName); err != nil {
   494→		result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   495→			StepID:  "push",
   496→			Success: false,
   497→			Message: fmt.Sprintf("Push failed: %v", err),
   498→		})
   499→		result.ErrorMessage = fmt.Sprintf("failed to push branch: %v", err)
